action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace and no baseline yet. Analysis: must first validate end-to-end pipeline quickly and get an eval/time measurement; noisy labels suggest using a pretrained backbone with strong augmentation and a simple robust loss/label-smoothing baseline. Decision: write a compact timm ConvNeXt-Tiny classifier with CIFAR-friendly resizing, train a few epochs, save checkpoint, test predict.py locally, and submit eval immediately.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 4 --batch_size 64 --lr 3e-4 --image_size 224 --out checkpoints/baseline.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline.pt --output baseline_preds.json
